const plan = [
  { day: 1, track: 'track-01.mp3', tags: ['nature','forest','morning'], theme: 'Forest Morning' },
  { day: 2, track: 'track-02.mp3', tags: ['ocean','sunset','calm'], theme: 'Ocean Sunset' },
  { day: 3, track: 'track-03.mp3', tags: ['rain','city','night'], theme: 'Rainy City Night' },
  { day: 4, track: 'track-04.mp3', tags: ['mountains','clouds','ambient'], theme: 'Cloudy Mountains' },
  { day: 5, track: 'track-05.mp3', tags: ['surf','beach','golden hour'], theme: 'Surf Golden Hour' },
  { day: 6, track: 'track-06.mp3', tags: ['river','green','chill'], theme: 'Riverside Chill' },
  { day: 7, track: 'track-07.mp3', tags: ['sea','waves','focus'], theme: 'Sea Focus' },
  { day: 8, track: 'track-08.mp3', tags: ['forest','rain','calm'], theme: 'Forest Rain' },
  { day: 9, track: 'track-09.mp3', tags: ['sunrise','mountain','study'], theme: 'Sunrise Study' },
  { day: 10, track: 'track-10.mp3', tags: ['ocean','drone','ambient'], theme: 'Ocean Drift' },
  { day: 11, track: 'track-11.mp3', tags: ['jungle','mist','deep'], theme: 'Misty Jungle' },
  { day: 12, track: 'track-12.mp3', tags: ['city','night','lights'], theme: 'Night Lights' },
  { day: 13, track: 'track-13.mp3', tags: ['waterfall','nature','relax'], theme: 'Waterfall Relax' },
  { day: 14, track: 'track-14.mp3', tags: ['beach','sun','chill'], theme: 'Sunny Beach Chill' },
  { day: 15, track: 'track-15.mp3', tags: ['forest','path','focus'], theme: 'Forest Path Focus' },
  { day: 16, track: 'track-16.mp3', tags: ['surf','ocean','calm'], theme: 'Calm Surf' },
  { day: 17, track: 'track-17.mp3', tags: ['snow','mountain','ambient'], theme: 'Snowy Ambient' },
  { day: 18, track: 'track-18.mp3', tags: ['rain','window','sleep'], theme: 'Rain Window Sleep' },
  { day: 19, track: 'track-19.mp3', tags: ['lake','sunset','meditation'], theme: 'Lake Meditation' },
  { day: 20, track: 'track-20.mp3', tags: ['island','sea','vibes'], theme: 'Island Vibes' },
  { day: 21, track: 'track-21.mp3', tags: ['forest','wind','deep work'], theme: 'Forest Deep Work' },
  { day: 22, track: 'track-22.mp3', tags: ['ocean','moonlight','night'], theme: 'Moonlight Ocean' },
  { day: 23, track: 'track-23.mp3', tags: ['city','rain','late night'], theme: 'Late Night City' },
  { day: 24, track: 'track-24.mp3', tags: ['mountain','sunset','focus'], theme: 'Mountain Focus' },
  { day: 25, track: 'track-25.mp3', tags: ['sea','rocks','calm'], theme: 'Sea Rocks Calm' },
  { day: 26, track: 'track-26.mp3', tags: ['river','autumn','study'], theme: 'Autumn River Study' },
  { day: 27, track: 'track-27.mp3', tags: ['forest','night','sleep'], theme: 'Night Forest Sleep' },
  { day: 28, track: 'track-28.mp3', tags: ['beach','dawn','ambient'], theme: 'Beach Dawn Ambient' },
  { day: 29, track: 'track-29.mp3', tags: ['ocean','storm','dark'], theme: 'Ocean Storm Dark' },
  { day: 30, track: 'track-30.mp3', tags: ['nature','mixed','lofi'], theme: 'Nature Lofi Mixed' }
];

const dayIndex = (new Date().getUTCDate() - 1) % plan.length;
const item = plan[dayIndex];
return [{ json: item }];
